history.subject: T12 statement repair: the finite-strata flattening statements (flatLocusReduction, flatLocusAssembly, flatteningStratification, _universal, .ofCurve) require a NOETHERIAN base, not merely locally noetherian — with only local noetherianity the finite family is impossible (on ⊔ₙ 𝔸ⁿ with the nested-flag sheaf ⊕_{k≤n} O_{V_k}, component n forces ≥ n+1 strata). Lean hypotheses strengthened to IsNoetherian, blueprint bodies aligned with Nitsure's wording, counterexample recorded in docstring + blueprint remark. The ℕ-indexed n=0 case stays locally noetherian (fibre rank is the global index).
Flatness under pushout base change (Stacks 00HI module form): B⊗[A]M is S⊗[R]M for a ring pushout, via of_lift_unique; Module.Flat.of_isPushout

Affine pieces of fibre-product squares: affinity, section-ring pushout (via Mathlib pushoutSection), per-piece flatness/finiteness transfer via Lane F section formula; de-privatize pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap{,_sectionLinearEquiv}
genericFlatness refactor: quasi-coherent core genericFlatness_of_finite_sections (chart supply as hypothesis), 01PC wrapper unchanged statement
Flatness over the base is affine-local (Stacks 00HT style): chart flatness on an affine cover implies all affine pairs, via two-layer basic-open reduction
Reduced vanishing-ideal subschemes (radical ideal sheaf, reduced affine pieces, integral when irreducible) + CoherentSheafFlat transport along sheaf isos
Flat stratum over an irreducible component: generic flatness on the reduced component transfers to every substratum via pasted pullback squares, piece charts, and affine-locality

flatLocusReduction (Nitsure Lemma 6) PROVED: Noetherian wf-induction on closed strata, flat strata over reduced irreducible components; flatteningStratification now sorry-free axiom-clean; geometric sections moved to GenericFlatnessGeometric (import direction)

Blueprint: five transfer-lemma nodes (pushout flatness 00HI, affine piece, affine-locality, integral reduced subscheme, flat stratum), complete Lemma-6 proof with leanok, assembly leanok, formalization status

Prove the n=0 flat-locus stratification: for S noetherian and F coherent, an N-indexed disjoint family of locally-closed immersions covering |S| with F flat over each stratum, derived from the flattening-stratification existence theorem at pi = id_S. New transport API: CoherentSheafFlat absorbs an isomorphism on the base leg (coherentSheafFlat_of_comp_isIso, via flatness along a bijective change of the acting ring, Flat.trans with a free rank-one tower); strata realized as pullback schemes along id with pullback.fst as immersion, empty-scheme padding for the tail indices. Repair the universal-property statement to Nitsure's actual n=0 special case (flatLocusStratification_universal, entry-ideal strata): the former proper-pi generality is not in the cited source (Nitsure proves part (ii) for P^n_S) and reduced strata provably cannot witness it (Spec k[eps] forces canonical non-reduced stratum structure). Blueprint nodes updated accordingly; flatLocusStratification hypothesis noetherian (matching Nitsure Par.4), lem proof leanok.
